body_txt: A character gains a lot of weight in a short time (for example, from a Balloon Belly ), gaining mass in every part of their body, even their voice. Their voice will get deeper and thicker as if some of the extra pounds ended up in their larynx. Generally only found in animated works, and very common in anime. Not to be confused with the Heavy's voice . Compare and contrast Power Makes Your Voice Deep and Resized Vocals . Might be combined with Weight Taller .
